name: Peanut Butter Fudge #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine until soft.
2. Blend in the corn syrup; add peanut butter, salt, and vanilla.
3. Gradually add powdered sugar, ensuring it is well blended.
4. Place the mixture on a cutting board and knead to combine thoroughly.
5. Form the mixture into a square and cut into small pieces.
6. No baking is needed.
